children.name: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance standards and requirements
children.characters: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance standards and requirements

children.name: Border changes to primary color + ring
children.characters: Border changes to primary color + ring

children.name: Rule: All interactive elements must have a visible
children.characters: Rule: All interactive elements must have a visible focus indicator with minimum 3:1 contrast ratio against the background.

children.name: Rule: Minimum clickable/touchable area must be at
children.characters: Rule: Minimum clickable/touchable area must be at least 40×40px. Recommended size is 48×48px for better usability.

children.name: This text has sufficient contrast against its back
children.characters: This text has sufficient contrast against its background (minimum 4.5:1 ratio required for body text)

children.name: Large text (18px+ or 14px+ bold) requires minimum
children.characters: Large text (18px+ or 14px+ bold) requires minimum 3:1 contrast ratio

children.name: Non-text UI elements require minimum 3:1 contrast
children.characters: Non-text UI elements require minimum 3:1 contrast ratio

children.name: Rule: Tab order must follow logical reading order
children.characters: Rule: Tab order must follow logical reading order (left-to-right, top-to-bottom). Use semantic HTML and avoid positive tabindex values.

children.name: ⚠ Please enter a valid email address
children.characters: ⚠ Please enter a valid email address

children.name: Error message appears directly below the input fie
children.characters: Error message appears directly below the input field with clear visual association

children.name: Error message placement disrupts the natural readi
children.characters: Error message placement disrupts the natural reading flow

children.name: Rule: Error messages must appear immediately after
children.characters: Rule: Error messages must appear immediately after the associated input field, use clear language, and include an icon or visual indicator. Use aria-describedby to programmatically link errors to inputs.
